title: HL Decorated
description: HL Decorated: Add style to your world! New decorative blocks for endless creativity!
body:
### HL Decorated

Elevate your Minecraft world to new heights with the HL Decorated! This immersive mod introduces a diverse selection of new decorative blocks, perfect for adding personality and flair to your builds.

 

Let your imagination run wild as you experiment with unique textures and patterns. Create intricate mosaics with colorful stained glass, or add a touch of opulence with shimmering gold blocks. With an extensive catalog of decorative blocks at your fingertips, the possibilities are endless.

 

Unleash your creativity and transform your Minecraft world with the HL Decorated. Whether you're a seasoned builder or just starting out, this mod will inspire you to create stunning works of art that truly stand out.

 

 

v0.0.6

-Bug Fixes

-Add Bamboo

 

Russian lang is comming soon

Mod by HLNikNiky

Block asstes by terrariumearth (Chipped)
